case_title: LEE SONIA VS J AND K JEWELEY CORP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $160.50 FILED BY LEE SONIA AS TO DEFENDANT J AND K JEWELEY CORP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-25-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
